1<?php
2
3namespace Local\Permission\Traits;
4
5use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
6use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\MorphToMany;
7use Illuminate\Support\Collection;
8use Local\Permission\Models\Permission;
9
10/**
11 * Direct (role-free) permission grants. Compose with HasRoles — or use
12 * HasRolesAndPermissions, which wires both together — for role-granted
13 * permissions as well.
14 *
15 * @phpstan-require-extends Model
16 */
17trait HasPermissions
18{
19    /**
20     * Permissions granted directly to this model, bypassing roles.
21     *
22     * @return MorphToMany<Permission, $this>
23     */
24    public function permissions(): MorphToMany
25    {
26        return $this->morphToMany(
27            static::permissionClass(),
28            'model',
29            config('permission.table_names.model_has_permissions'),
30            config('permission.column_names.model_morph_key', 'model_id'),
31            'permission_id'
32        );
33    }
34
35    /**
36     * The configured Permission model. Validated rather than trusted: a
37     * config typo would otherwise surface as an obscure relation error.
38     *
39     * @return class-string<Permission>
40     */
41    protected static function permissionClass(): string
42    {
43        $class = config('permission.models.permission', Permission::class);
44
45        return is_string($class) && is_a($class, Permission::class, true)
46            ? $class
47            : Permission::class;
48    }
49
50    /**
51     * @param  string|Permission|array<int, string|Permission>  ...$permissions
52     */
53    public function givePermissionTo(...$permissions): static
54    {
55        $this->permissions()->syncWithoutDetaching($this->resolvePermissionIds($permissions));
56        $this->unsetRelation('permissions');
57
58        return $this;
59    }
60
61    /**
62     * @param  string|Permission|array<int, string|Permission>  ...$permissions
63     */
64    public function revokePermissionTo(...$permissions): static
65    {
66        $this->permissions()->detach($this->resolvePermissionIds($permissions));
67        $this->unsetRelation('permissions');
68
69        return $this;
70    }
71
72    /**
73     * @param  string|Permission|array<int, string|Permission>  ...$permissions
74     */
75    public function syncPermissions(...$permissions): static
76    {
77        $this->permissions()->sync($this->resolvePermissionIds($permissions));
78        $this->unsetRelation('permissions');
79
80        return $this;
81    }
82
83    public function hasDirectPermission(string|Permission $permission): bool
84    {
85        $name = $permission instanceof Permission ? $permission->name : $permission;
86
87        return $this->permissions->contains('name', $name);
88    }
89
90    /**
91     * Direct grants only. Models that also carry roles use
92     * HasRolesAndPermissions, which overrides this to fall back to the
93     * role-granted permissions as well.
94     */
95    public function hasPermissionTo(string|Permission $permission): bool
96    {
97        $name = $permission instanceof Permission ? $permission->name : $permission;
98
99        return $this->hasDirectPermission($name);
100    }
101
102    /**
103     * @param  string|Permission|array<int, string|Permission>  ...$permissions
104     */
105    public function hasAnyPermission(...$permissions): bool
106    {
107        foreach (Collection::make($permissions)->flatten() as $permission) {
108            if ($this->hasPermissionTo($permission)) {
109                return true;
110            }
111        }
112
113        return false;
114    }
115
116    /**
117     * @param  string|Permission|array<int, string|Permission>  ...$permissions
118     */
119    public function hasAllPermissions(...$permissions): bool
120    {
121        foreach (Collection::make($permissions)->flatten() as $permission) {
122            if (! $this->hasPermissionTo($permission)) {
123                return false;
124            }
125        }
126
127        return true;
128    }
129
130    /**
131     * Directly-granted permission names. HasRolesAndPermissions overrides
132     * this to merge in the ones granted via roles.
133     *
134     * @return Collection<int, string>
135     */
136    public function getAllPermissions(): Collection
137    {
138        return $this->permissions->pluck('name')->unique()->values();
139    }
140
141    /**
142     * @param  array<int, string|Permission>  $permissions
143     * @return array<int, int>
144     */
145    protected function resolvePermissionIds(array $permissions): array
146    {
147        return Collection::make($permissions)
148            ->flatten()
149            ->map(fn (string|Permission $permission) => $permission instanceof Permission
150                ? $permission->id
151                : Permission::findOrCreate($permission)->id)
152            ->all();
153    }
154}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable
